metadata.description: Kanban board for Optimized Inventory Search and Filtering. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Optimized Inventory Search and Filtering
tasks.description: Implement high-performance inventory search with filtering by type, condition, price range, location, and other attributes. Must handle 10,000+ items efficiently.
tasks.userStory: As a store employee, I want to quickly search and filter large inventories so that I can find items efficiently even with 10,000+ items.
acceptanceCriteria: Given inventory search, when user enters search terms, then results are returned in <2 seconds even with 10,000+ items
Given search functionality, when filtering by item type (game, card, console, etc.), then only matching items are shown
Given search functionality, when filtering by condition, then only items with selected conditions are shown
Given search functionality, when filtering by price range, then only items within price range are shown
Given search results, when displayed, then pagination is used (50 items per page) for performance
Given search, when multiple filters are applied, then all filters work together (AND logic)
Given search performance, when 10,000+ items exist, then search completes without timeout or performance degradation
tasks.businessValue: Enables efficient inventory management for large stores. Critical for user experience with large inventories.
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement database indexes on searchable fields. Use full-text search where appropriate. Implement query optimization. Use pagination and lazy loading. Consider caching for frequent searches.
successMetrics: Search performance: 95%+ of searches complete in <2 seconds
Search accuracy: 98%+ of relevant items found in search results
businessRules: Results must be paginated (50 items per page default)
Search must include CompanyId filter for data isolation
Search supports: name, SKU, barcode, description
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
